2026-07-18T05:54:39.2689676Z ##[group]Run # Create a temporary file
2026-07-18T05:54:39.2689914Z [36;1m# Create a temporary file[0m
2026-07-18T05:54:39.2690060Z [36;1mtouch /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-07-18T05:54:39.2690196Z [36;1m[0m
2026-07-18T05:54:39.2690333Z [36;1m# Add the opening of the asciiart definition[0m
2026-07-18T05:54:39.2690540Z [36;1mecho 'static char* asciiart =' > /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-07-18T05:54:39.2690715Z [36;1m[0m
2026-07-18T05:54:39.2690829Z [36;1m# Decode base64 ASCII art to a file[0m
2026-07-18T05:54:39.3371651Z [36;1mecho "" | base64 -d > /tmp/ascii_input.txt[0m
2026-07-18T05:54:39.4050540Z [36;1m[0m
2026-07-18T05:54:39.4050709Z [36;1m# Process each line of the input ASCII art and format it properly[0m
2026-07-18T05:54:39.4050922Z [36;1mwhile IFS= read -r line; do[0m
2026-07-18T05:54:39.4051070Z [36;1m  # Escape backslashes[0m
2026-07-18T05:54:39.4051234Z [36;1m  escaped_line=$(echo "$line" | sed 's/\\/\\\\/g')[0m
2026-07-18T05:54:39.4051414Z [36;1m  # Escape any double quotes[0m
2026-07-18T05:54:39.4051592Z [36;1m  escaped_line=$(echo "$escaped_line" | sed 's/"/\\"/g')[0m
2026-07-18T05:54:39.4051896Z [36;1m  # Add the line with proper C string formatting[0m
2026-07-18T05:54:39.4052097Z [36;1m  echo '"'"$escaped_line"'\n"' >> /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-07-18T05:54:39.4052273Z [36;1mdone < /tmp/ascii_input.txt[0m
2026-07-18T05:54:39.4052404Z [36;1m[0m
2026-07-18T05:54:39.4052520Z [36;1m# Add the closing part with VERSION[0m
2026-07-18T05:54:39.4052765Z [36;1mecho '"             Free60.org XeLL - Xenon Linux Loader " VERSION "\n";' >> /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-07-18T05:54:39.4052992Z [36;1m[0m
2026-07-18T05:54:39.4053099Z [36;1m# Add the asciitail part[0m
2026-07-18T05:54:39.4053270Z [36;1mecho 'static char* asciitail =' >> /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-07-18T05:54:39.4053545Z [36;1mecho '"    Special Corona & Winchester Compatible XeLL version\n\n";' >> /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-07-18T05:54:39.4053780Z [36;1m[0m
2026-07-18T05:54:39.4053886Z [36;1m# Ensure CP437 encoding[0m
2026-07-18T05:54:39.4054173Z [36;1miconv -f UTF-8 -t CP437 /tmp/new_asciiart.h > /tmp/new_asciiart_cp437.h || cp /tmp/new_asciiart.h /tmp/new_asciiart_cp437.h[0m
2026-07-18T05:54:39.4054454Z [36;1m[0m
2026-07-18T05:54:39.4054560Z [36;1m# Replace the original file[0m
2026-07-18T05:54:39.4054732Z [36;1mcp /tmp/new_asciiart_cp437.h source/lv2/asciiart.h[0m
